Type: nodejs-express | Files: 355 | Languages: javascript(189), typescript(95), unknown(37), json(19), markdown(6)

overview.name: aquiplex-platform-phase11
overview.purpose: AQUIPLEX — AI platform. AQUA is the AI.
overview.summary: aquiplex-platform-phase11 is a Node.js/Express project with 355 source files, primarily javascript, typescript, json.

importantServices.summary: AQUA Provider Errors — Shared Error Classification
AQUA Internal Intelligence Engine — Reasoning Engine
AQUA Internal Intelligence Engine — Confidence Engine (Phase 12)

potentialTechDebt: 8 very large files (>40KB) — candidates for splitting: public/css/styles.css, public/css/landing.css, public/css/platform.css
1 files exceeded the 100KB ingest cap and were truncated during indexing.
1 circular dependency chain detected — e.g. aqua/src/memory/memoryResolver.js → aqua/src/memory/longTermMemory.js → aqua/src/memory/memoryResolver.js.
14 duplicated file basenames across folders (e.g. symbolGraph.test.js, projectRetriever.digest.test.js, callGraph.test.js) — possible copy-paste drift.

architecture.frontend: Built with React, React DOM, React Router, Tailwind CSS; UI lives in component directories.
architecture.backend: Express, CORS middleware, Multer uploads power the server side, organized around route modules.
architecture.apiLayer: 60 HTTP endpoints detected, composed via mounted routers.
architecture.authFlow: Passport.js, bcrypt password hashing, Session-based auth, Google OAuth.
architecture.serviceRelationships: Most depended-upon modules: mindStore.js (15), mindSchema.js (13), workspaceManager.js (12), longTermMemory.js (11).
architecture.dependencyFlow: Execution starts at index.js; dependencies flow toward core modules like aqua/src/mind/mindStore.js.

suggestedImprovements: Break circular dependencies by extracting shared logic into a leaf module.
Split the largest files into focused modules to improve maintainability.
Triage the 1 TODO/FIXME markers — convert stale ones into tracked issues.
Add a Dockerfile for reproducible builds and deployment.
suggestedQuestions: Explain the architecture of this project.
Walk me through the folder structure and what each part does.
How does authentication work in this codebase?
Show me every API endpoint and what it does.
How is data stored and accessed via MongoDB (Mongoose)?
Trace what happens when index.js starts up.
Explain what aqua/src/mind/mindStore.js does and what depends on it.
How is the Razorpay payments integration implemented?
